nasb.text: For you have made the Lord, my refuge, Even the Most High, your dwelling place.

esv.text: Because you have made the Lord your dwelling place— the Most High, who is my refuge—

cnv.text: 你既然把耶和華當作自己的避難所， 把至高者當作自己的居所，

ccb.text: 因为你以至高者耶和华——我的避难所作你的居所，

csbs.text: 因为你把耶和华 ——至高者、我的避难所—— 当作你的居所，
